powerContribution.availabilityReason: Per-power resolver-derived cooldown availability applied before final monster outcome axes; authored cooldown fields are fallback only.

perPowerAvailability.name: Bolstering Shout
perPowerAvailability.availabilityReason: Resolver-derived cooldown 1 was used for Phase 6 table availability; authored cooldown fields are fallback only. Radar availability applied table factor 0.75 against level-relative cooldown load exponent 1.2 for load factor 0.28371457908463216, producing factor 0.21278593431347412.

resultScalingFollowThrough.axisNote: Combo axis follows the scaled follow-through packet lane instead of defaulting to Synergy.

sources.resistAxisContributionPolicy: Resist dice are defensive capability and do not emit offensive radar axes by themselves.
